I have 6 failing tests across 3 unrelated files:

1. src/auth/auth-flow.test.ts (2 failures) - JWT validation timing issues
2. src/billing/stripe-webhook.test.ts (2 failures) - webhook signature mock wrong
3. src/reports/csv-export.test.ts (2 failures) - encoding error for special chars

These are completely independent — fixing one won't affect the others. Please fix all of them.
